# tdd-vs-spec

> Is the spec additive? Evaluating TDD vs spec-driven development for coding agents on SWE-bench Pro

## Documentation

- [Installation](docs/index.md#installation): Install tdd-vs-spec using pip or uv
- [Usage](docs/index.md#usage): Learn how to use tdd-vs-spec as a library or CLI tool
- [Development](docs/index.md#development): Set up a development environment and run tests

## Project Information

- **Source Code**: https://github.com/Unknown/tdd-vs-spec
- **PyPI Package**: https://pypi.org/project/tdd-vs-spec
- **Documentation**: https://Unknown.github.io/tdd-vs-spec

## AI Integration

- **MCP Server**: Model Context Protocol server available at `src/tdd_vs_spec/mcp_server.py` for AI-powered documentation access
- **Agent Skill**: Claude Code skill available in `.skills/tdd_vs_spec/SKILL.md` for enhanced project interaction
